one_time_description: Elkhorn Ranch settlement from ISC received in May 2022, recorded as accounts receivable at March 31, 2022; up to 75% to be distributed to membership
economic_notes: Akisq'nuk operates a campground/Lakeshore Resort, has investments in Ktunaxa Enterprises Ltd., Ktunaxa Holdings LP, SEM Resort LP interests, and BCFN Gaming Revenue LP. Akisq'nuk Resources Limited Partnership is a GBP engaged in natural resources. Columbia Lake Recreation Society was dissolved in FY2022.
notes: Large one-time item: $28M Elkhorn Ranch ISC settlement recorded as accounts receivable at March 31, 2022 (received May 2022), inflating both revenue and surplus significantly. Consolidated entities include Eva Joseph Early Learning and Cultural Society, Akisq'nuk Housing Society, and 1285651 BC Ltd. GBEs include Akisq'nuk Natural Resource Corporation, 0910003 BC Ltd., and Akisq'nuk Resources Limited Partnership (99.99% interest). Columbia Lake Recreation Society dissolved during FY2022. No remuneration schedule included in the provided financial statements. Total government transfers calculated as ISC + BC Province + Ktunaxa Nation Council + FNHA + Other FN agencies + Grants + CMHC = 29405564+2091457+20000+546808+122097+480695+97130 = 32763751. OSR includes FNGST, property tax, leases, interest, housing rent, IMBA, Eva Joseph Society revenue, and equity in earnings.
warnings: One-time items ($1) represent 0.0% of revenue — surplus may not reflect ongoing operations
High ISC dependency (81.86%) — operations heavily reliant on federal transfers
